nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Andree, Jacques, Michel, Monique.
French: habitational name from any of the places in Calvados, Loiret, Manche, and Marne called Courcy.
History: Nicolas Lemière dit Courcy from Courcy in Manche, France, married Louise-Geneviève Dubé in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1749.

nameMeanings.name: Raoul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul de Courcy was born in 1108, in Courcy, Calvados, Normandy, France, his father, Robert de Courcy, was 38 and his mother, Rohais Grandmesnil, was 37. He died in 1167, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul de Courcy est né en 1108, à Courcy, Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Robert de Courcy, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Rohais Grandmesnil, avait 37 ans. Il est décédé en 1167, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul de Courcy 1108 in Courcy, Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Courcy 38 und seine Mutter Rohais Grandmesnil 37. Er starb 1167 im Alter von 59 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul de Courcy è nato il nel 1108 nel Courcy, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Courcy, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Rohais Grandmesnil, aveva 37 anni. Morì nel 1167, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul de Courcyが1108年にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスコウルシで生まれた時，父Robert de Courcyは38歳，母Rohais Grandmesnilは37歳であった。彼は1167年に59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Raoul de Courcy(이)가 1108년 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스 쿠르시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Courcy(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohais Grandmesnil(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1167년 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul de Courcy nasceu em 1108, em Courcy, Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert de Courcy, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Rohais Grandmesnil, tinha 37 anos. Ele faleceu em 1167, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul de Courcy родился в 1108 г. в местности коурси, калвадос, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Courcy было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohais Grandmesnil, 37. Он умер в 1167 г. в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raoul de Courcy nació en 1108, en Courcy, Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert de Courcy, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Rohais Grandmesnil, tenía 37 años. Murió en 1167, a la edad de 59 años.
